image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Weak attractions can change everything.
Context visual: Hydrogen bonds are invisible yet powerful. They shape water's unique properties.
Escalation visual: These bonds hold DNA base pairs together, guiding life itself.
Evidence visual: In proteins, hydrogen bonds dictate how they fold, influencing their function.
Payoff visual: So, next time you drink water or think of DNA, remember these unseen forces.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into the wonders of science? Hit that follow button!
